content_type: propaganda graphic (patriotic painting with text overlay)
genre_refs: Arnold Friberg, 'The Prayer at Valley Forge' (George Washington praying)
description: A designed graphic built on a reproduction of Arnold Friberg's well-known patriotic painting 'The Prayer at Valley Forge'. The realist oil illustration depicts General George Washington in Revolutionary War dress (red-lined dark cloak, buff breeches, boots, sword) kneeling in prayer in a snowy winter forest beside his light-colored saddled horse, head bowed and hands clasped, with warm sunset light on the snow. Overlaid across the bottom in an ornate white blackletter/Old English serif font is the text 'One Nation Under God'. No DOL seal is visible in the asset. Visual style: fine-art historical painting (illustration) with a single decorative text overlay. Per the tweet, it pairs the image with a 1789 George Washington quote about acknowledging 'the Providence of Almighty God'. Messaging/propaganda technique: Christian-nationalist appeal that ties the founding of the nation, Washington's piety and divine providence to present-day American identity ('One Nation Under God'), lending the administration's messaging historical and religious gravitas. Target audience: religious and patriotic conservatives, reinforcing a faith-rooted national narrative.
